behavior_in_task_description.reason: All test-asserted strings (option name, type name, test titles, SqlQuery import) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the feature and requirements without giving exact code or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_statementNameGenerator_called_in_query asserts the exact string 'this.pgOptions?.statementNameGenerator?.(query)' — valid alternatives like storing pgOptions differently or using a different optional-chaining style would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are substring checks on source files (open().read() assertions); only eslint/vitest/prettier subprocess tests execute code, and the vitest test runs errors.test.ts, not the new statementNameGenerator behavior tests.

test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests require specific source-code content (option name, exact invocation string, type signature) that a stub couldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Option existence, generator invocation, type export, test titles, SqlQuery import, and JSDoc presence are all covered.

informative_test_structure.reason: Each test has a docstring explaining f2p/p2p and what it checks.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers in instruction.md match those used in the tests and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Files are named at a reasonable level (pg.ts, pg.test.ts); no line numbers given.
